identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Editorial Layouts with Technical Dashboards.
Content is King: The question text is the hero. Everything else is support.
Negative Space: White space is active, not passive.
Contrast: High contrast for readability. No grey-on-grey text.

headings.usage: Page titles, Section headers, Key metrics

buttons.classes: rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wide font-medium shadow-none hover:shadow-md transition-all active:scale-95

cards.classes: bg-card border border-border shadow-none rounded-sm p-6 hover:border-foreground/20 transition-colors

badges.classes: rounded-full px-3 py-1 text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

tracing_beam.description: A glowing gradient line that travels around the active question card.
tracing_beam.usage: Active item in the Editor list

grid_borders.description: Visible grid lines for data tables and dashboard widgets.

glassmorphism.usage: Sticky headers and toast notifications only

backgrounds.description: Red wall with white lines - Use for Login Screen Background or Hero Section
Red paper shapes - Use for decorative accents or 404 page

logos.description: YouTube Logo Button - Use for 'Connect YouTube' action card

universal_guidelines: Do not converge toward generic AI slop.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Use grids and asymmetry.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) for overlays.
MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). Use specific properties.
MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Always use modern button styles (pill or sharp).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠 for icons.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Main agent relies on provided image URLs. Do not use placeholders.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup Tailwind Colors: Update tailwind.config.js with the Swiss Palette defined above.
2. Install Fonts: Add Oswald and Manrope via Google Fonts in index.css.
3. Create Layouts: Build the Bento Grid Dashboard and Split View Editor using standard divs and grid classes.
4. Components: Customize Shadcn components to match the 'Sharp & Swiss' aesthetic (remove heavy rounded corners).
5. Theme: Implement Light/Dark mode toggle using next-themes (already in package.json). Default to Light Mode (Swiss Style).
